query:
_index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory = "collector_and_tier_volume"
| parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
| json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as collector, dataTier, bytes, count
|where dataTier matches "{{Tier}}"
| bytes/1Gi as gbytes 
| timeslice 1h
| sum(gbytes) as daily_ingest_gbytes by _timeslice, collector
| transpose row _timeslice column collector

sources.dashboardName: Data Volume - Logs by Metadata Fields
sources.dashboardDescription: The Data Volume - Logs by Metadata Fields dashboard allows you to view log ingest volume by tier, source categories, collectors and hosts.
